---
title: "Rallies &amp; Campaign"
subtitle: "5,843 posts where this was the primary topic."
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  h1 { border-bottom-color: #8B5E2A !important; }
</style>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [1, 2, 29, 115, 203, 258, 647, 641, 194, 278, 393, 638, 26, 328, 651, 1000, 341, 98],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#8B5E2A" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>great again</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>america great</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>make america</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>president trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>twitter com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>rumble com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>https rumble</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>donaldjtrump com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>live president</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>pic twitter</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>president donald</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>america first</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B5E2A'>join live</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

<div class="post-stream">

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2022">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 03, 2022  19:49</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">BIG crowd in Pennsylvania. Will be there soon. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_108936204457052626" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/108936204457052626" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2023">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 29, 2023  17:21</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">BIG RALLY IN PENNSYLVANIA TODAY!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110798523813944233" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110798523813944233" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 29, 2017  23:35</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Looking forward to RALLY in the Great State of Pennsylvania tonight at 7:30. Big crowd</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_858343980823703553" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/858343980823703553" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2016">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 01, 2016  16:29</span>
    <span class="platform">Twitter</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">&quot;Heading to Pennsylvania for a big rally tonight. We will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!&quot;</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_782331741369462784" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/782331741369462784" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 29, 2024  16:28</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. PUT AMERICA FIRST!!!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112355451692209120" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112355451692209120" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2022">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 31, 2022  12:02</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">BIG Rally in Pennsylvania on Saturday Night. Crowds already forming. Much, Much, Much to say. Don’t miss it!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_108917381078586128" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/108917381078586128" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 22, 2025  13:10</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115072579716416093" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115072579716416093" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 18, 2025  13:26</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115049995743385270" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115049995743385270" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 20, 2025  03:19</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">Make America Great Again!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114713532776899739" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114713532776899739" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 26, 2025  12:17</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114574090132139073" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114574090132139073" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 16, 2025  11:06</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114347318770577330" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114347318770577330" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 09, 2025  11:46</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114307836775073198" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114307836775073198" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2025">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 14, 2025  06:54</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113825394837263070" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113825394837263070" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 31, 2024  14:17</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113747861555910898" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113747861555910898" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 19, 2024  11:19</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113509346733380453" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113509346733380453" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 04, 2024  14:36</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113425185981054000" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113425185981054000" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 27, 2024  15:32</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113380106874672916" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113380106874672916" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 21, 2024  22:09</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113347694442026232" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113347694442026232" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 21, 2024  04:59</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113343644642108827" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113343644642108827" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 20, 2024  22:48</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113342187359770185" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113342187359770185" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 16, 2024  21:29</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113319225974532706" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113319225974532706" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 12, 2024  19:41</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113296150370362892" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113296150370362892" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 06, 2024  04:13</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113258529486125192" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113258529486125192" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 21, 2024  12:40</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113175587132767274" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113175587132767274" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 15, 2024  11:48</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113141409882643995" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113141409882643995" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 10, 2024  01:29</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113110664468467298" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113110664468467298" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 25, 2024  11:27</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113022420800652601" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113022420800652601" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 18, 2024  20:21</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112984883983921236" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112984883983921236" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 18, 2024  00:00</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112980080371916526" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112980080371916526" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 25, 2024  03:24</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112844988657995782" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112844988657995782" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 19, 2024  23:30</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112815755851061703" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112815755851061703" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 30, 2024  21:20</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112707663256190133" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112707663256190133" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 29, 2024  03:52</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112697878935283529" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112697878935283529" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 24, 2024  15:08</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112496694154047667" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112496694154047667" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 24, 2024  02:55</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112493809268149105" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112493809268149105" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 13, 2024  21:41</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112435953760735348" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112435953760735348" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 10, 2024  10:57</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112246564015336037" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112246564015336037" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 28, 2024  23:26</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112175901169298494" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112175901169298494" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2024  04:52</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111769494343315913" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111769494343315913" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

<article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2024">
  <div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div>
  <div class="meta">
    <span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2024  04:50</span>
    <span class="platform">Truth Social</span>
  </div>
  <div class="text">MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!</div>
  <div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div>
  <div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;">
    <span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111769485548726958" disabled>Read aloud</button></span>
    <span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111769485548726958" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span>
  </div>
</article>

</div>

::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
